notes: SKIP — char-match floor (Rule 0) never satisfied. Pinyin 'Jinghao' is highly ambiguous (景皓 / 景豪 / 静浩 / 京浩 / 竟豪 / 静豪 ...) and surname 胡 needs to be paired with the exact two given chars on a candidate page. Searched: (1) GitHub user search 'hujinghao' / 'jinghaohu' returned 11 distinct accounts; the most prominent is hujinghaoabcd (UCAS GIS PhD, last activity 2026-03-09 on soil_interpolation, 2026-03-16 profile updated_at). API name field shows only 'Jinghao Hu' in pinyin; bio is English-only ('PhD student (GIS), University of Chinese Academy of Sciences'); no Chinese characters anywhere on the profile, repo descriptions, or commit metadata to confirm 胡景皓 specifically. The implied institutional email hujinghao20@mails.ucas.ac.cn is recoverable from the @20 cohort convention but is NOT char-verified to 胡景皓 — could equally be any other 'Jinghao Hu' char combo. (2) arxiv au:'Jinghao Hu' returned 4 papers across two distinct author identities — (a) NWU/Xi'an CV group (with GuoHua Geng, Yuhe Zhang, Kang Li): 'StoryTailor' arxiv:2602.21273 CVPR 2026, updated 2026-03-06; 'Beyond Color and Lines' arxiv:2410.18537 Oct 2024; and (b) NJU SE group (with He Zhang, Yanjing Yang): 'BacAlarm' arxiv:2512.19997 Dec 2025; 'SPLVD' arxiv:2511.09212 Nov 2025. Both have last-30d-ish activity but neither author page nor any cited group homepage exposes Chinese characters for the 'Jinghao Hu' co-author, so I cannot tell which (if either) is 胡景皓 vs 胡景豪 vs 胡静浩 etc. (3) Science China Life Sciences 'Mechanosensor YAP / TEAD4-LEF1' (springer 10.1007/s11427-025-3130-4) lists Hu, J. as first author — author chars not exposed in indexable abstract. (4) HuggingFace API: jhhu = 'ftfhtf' (unrelated), jinghaohu / hujinghao both 404. (5) Chinese-character searches for '胡景皓' on Baidu/Google returned only a Hong Kong 2019 riot court case (LinkedIn HK profile + court filings) — wrong context for a tech DNC list. (6) Searches scoping institutions (UCAS, Tsinghua, PKU, USTC, NJU, NWU, Fudan, ZJU, SJTU) + 胡景皓 returned zero faculty/student page matches. Per Rule 4 ('better empty than wrong'): three plausible 'Jinghao Hu' identities exist (UCAS GIS PhD, NWU CV PhD, NJU SE PhD) all with recent activity, but with zero char-match evidence I cannot pick one without high collision risk. Skip.
